_meta.description: CANONICAL strategy registry — single source of truth for all 60 strategies. Session 35: IEXAuctionFade.
_meta.authority: This file governs live/shadow/disabled status. Code MUST read this.
rules: Every strategy has exactly ONE entry here.
No strategy exists in code without an entry here.
live = capital deployed. shadow = logged only. disabled = not evaluated.
Rust, Python, backtest, nightly, and reporting MUST use these IDs.

S1_Microstructure.name: Microstructure Alpha
S1_Microstructure.description: Spread/volume microstructure edge detection. Primary alpha source.

S2_Reversion.name: Mean Reversion
S2_Reversion.description: Statistical mean reversion on z-score extremes.

S3_MacroTrend.name: Macro Trend Following
S3_MacroTrend.description: Macro-driven trend following. Disabled: insufficient edge in backtest.

S4_VolPremium.name: Volatility Premium
S4_VolPremium.description: Short-vol premium harvesting + long-vol rebound. Modes: short_vol, long_rebound.

S5_OvernightCarry.name: Overnight Carry
S5_OvernightCarry.description: Overnight gap capture. Disabled: negative edge with real costs.

S6_Catalyst.name: Event Gap Fade
S6_Catalyst.description: REDESIGNED Session 30: fade gap-downs near macro events in MR regimes. Replaces gap continuation (13% WR). Filters: gap<-1%, hurst<0.55, rvol<3, IBS<0.3, spread<20bps.

S7_TailHedge.name: Tail Risk Hedge
S7_TailHedge.description: Tail risk hedging overlay. Activates on VIX >25 or 3-sigma moves. Activated Session 30.

NAVArbitrage.name: ETF NAV Arbitrage
NAVArbitrage.description: ETF premium/discount to NAV arbitrage. +28K PnL/sh. Best performer.

FOmcDrift.name: FOMC Drift
FOmcDrift.description: Pre/post FOMC announcement drift. T-1 and T+N variants. +12K PnL/sh.

TypeD_SupportBounce.name: Support Bounce
TypeD_SupportBounce.description: Price near daily low + RSI 25-35. +3.6K PnL/sh.

TypeA_DipRecovery.name: Dip Recovery
TypeA_DipRecovery.description: RSI oversold + volume spike recovery. Marginal edge.

TypeB_EarlyRunner.name: Early Runner (Momentum Continuation)
TypeB_EarlyRunner.description: 3-bar rising RVOL. Disabled: -141K drag in adversarial audit.

TypeF_OBVDivergence.name: OBV Divergence
TypeF_OBVDivergence.description: OBV-RSI divergence. Disabled: -36K with real costs.

TypeC_OverboughtFade.name: Overbought Fade
TypeC_OverboughtFade.description: RSI > 80 + price rising + volume declining. Rare trigger. Activated Session 30.

VanguardSniper_Momentum.name: Vanguard Sniper (ADX Momentum)
VanguardSniper_Momentum.description: Multi-factor ADX momentum scoring. Primary signal producer.

Orchestrator_VWAPDip.name: VWAP Dip Buy
Orchestrator_VWAPDip.description: VWAP sigma deviation mean-reversion. Multi-regime adaptive. Activated Session 30.

VolCompression.name: Volatility Compression
VolCompression.description: Bollinger squeeze detection. Disabled: insufficient edge.

ORB_Breakout.name: Opening Range Breakout
ORB_Breakout.description: US session 14:45-15:30 UTC opening range breakout. Activated Session 30.

GapFade.name: Gap Fade
GapFade.description: Gap-down > 1% + RVOL < 2. Event-driven gap fade. Activated Session 30.

RebalancingFlow.name: Rebalancing Flow
RebalancingFlow.description: Index rebalancing + quarter-end institutional flow signals. Activated Session 30.

NegRiskArb.name: Leveraged ETF Tracking Error
NegRiskArb.description: Leveraged ETF tracking error exploitation. Negative risk arbitrage. Activated Session 30.

PairsReversion.name: Pairs Reversion
PairsReversion.description: Cointegrated pairs trading on spread z-score. Kalman+OLS hybrid. Activated Session 29.

CointPairs.name: Cointegration Pairs
CointPairs.description: Engle-Granger cointegration test + Johansen rank detection. Activated Session 29.

AlphaFactory.name: Alpha Factory
AlphaFactory.description: Meta-strategy factory generating synthetic signals from factor combinations. IC calibrates over ~50 trades. Activated Session 30.

LeadLag.name: Lead-Lag Correlation
LeadLag.description: Cross-asset lead-lag detection (Hayashi-Yoshida correlation). Activated Session 30.

EMAT_Attention.name: EMA Temporal Attention
EMAT_Attention.description: EMA temporal attention scoring. Random-init weights, calibrates via paper trading. Activated Session 30.

TemporalAttention.name: Temporal Attention
TemporalAttention.description: Temporal attention for regime-aware signals. Random-init weights, calibrates via paper trading. Activated Session 30.

SwarmPredictor.name: Swarm Predictor
SwarmPredictor.description: 50-agent deterministic swarm consensus. Self-calibrating via wealth accumulation (~1000 tick warm-up). Activated Session 30.

HFT_Probability.name: HFT Probability
HFT_Probability.description: 5-state Markov chain probability scoring (tick-level order flow). Activated Session 30.

HighFlyer.name: High Flyer
HighFlyer.description: Retail flow-driven momentum detection (unusual volume + social). Activated Session 30.

NightRider.name: Night Rider
NightRider.description: Overnight reversal — buy >1.5% decliners near close, hold overnight. Activated Session 30.

EventDrift.name: Event Drift
EventDrift.description: General event-driven drift detection (CPI, NFP, BOE, earnings). Activated Session 30.

CopyTrading.name: Copy Trading
CopyTrading.description: Internal best-strategy replication. Fires when highest-Sharpe live strategy fires, with -5 confidence discount. Redesigned Session 30.

IVSURF_SkewDirectional.name: IV Surface Skew
IVSURF_SkewDirectional.description: IV skew directional signal. Uses IBKR opt_impl_vol vs opt_hist_vol ratio + scanner HIGH_OPT_IMP_VOLAT confirmation. Shadow: collecting data for promotion.

ApexScout.name: Apex Scout
ApexScout.description: RVOL anomaly + institutional flow detection from large block trades. Activated Session 30.

HEDGE_InverseETP.name: Inverse ETP Hedge
HEDGE_InverseETP.description: Inverse ETP overlay for portfolio tail risk hedging.

HEDGE_VIXAllocation.name: VIX Allocation
HEDGE_VIXAllocation.description: VIX-based dynamic allocation overlay. Activated Session 30.

HEDGE_CashRaise.name: Cash Raise
HEDGE_CashRaise.description: Systematic cash raise during high-risk regimes (posterior > 0.40). Activated Session 30.

Orchestrator_MomentumBurst.name: Momentum Burst Orchestrator
Orchestrator_MomentumBurst.description: Short-term momentum burst detection. Activated Session 30.

InsiderFlow.name: SEC Insider Trading
InsiderFlow.description: SEC Form 4 cluster buy detection (edgartools, free API). Activated Session 30.

SentimentOverlay.name: FinBERT Sentiment
SentimentOverlay.description: FinBERT NLP sentiment overlay from 11 news APIs. Session 25-26.

CongressionalTrading.name: Congressional Trading
CongressionalTrading.description: US Congressional stock trading signals (Quiver Quant API). Session 27.

OptionsFlow.name: Unusual Options Flow
OptionsFlow.description: Unusual options activity detection from CBOE data. Session 27.

CryptoFearGreed.name: Crypto Fear/Greed Index
CryptoFearGreed.description: Crypto market sentiment as risk-on/risk-off macro signal (free API). Activated Session 30.

OrderFlowImbalance.name: Order Flow Imbalance
OrderFlowImbalance.description: LOB order flow imbalance detection (bid/ask L1 from IBKR). Activated Session 30.

SocialSentiment.name: StockTwits Social Sentiment
SocialSentiment.description: StockTwits social sentiment aggregation (free API, 200 req/hr). Activated Session 30.

KalmanHedge.name: Kalman Filter Dynamic Hedge
KalmanHedge.description: Kalman filter for dynamic hedge ratio estimation in pairs. Activated Session 30.

SectorRotation.name: Sector Rotation
SectorRotation.description: Sector momentum rotation via SectorRotationScanner. Tick-fed, 60s recompute, scores merged into scanner_scores. Session 29.

LatencyArbitrage.name: Latency Arbitrage (NAV vs Market)
LatencyArbitrage.description: Book 195: NAV-vs-market-price latency arb. Detects temporary mispricing between iNAV and traded price. Session 33.

MacroNowcast.name: Macro Nowcasting
MacroNowcast.description: Book 84: Real-time economic data interpretation. 30-60s post-release drift capture. Gemini 2.5 Flash. Expected Sharpe +3.2. Session 33.

MultiLegArbitrage.name: Multi-Leg Vol Rank Arbitrage
MultiLegArbitrage.description: Book 206: Cross-ETP vol rank extremes. Multi-leg arb across paired ETFs. Session 33.

StatisticalArbitrage.name: Pairs Statistical Arbitrage
StatisticalArbitrage.description: Book 168: Cointegrated pairs trading signal generator. Separate from PairsReversion (OLS-based). Session 33.

CrossVenueArb.name: Cross-Venue Arbitrage
CrossVenueArb.description: Cross-venue price discrepancy detection across BATS/Chi-X/IEX/Aquis/LSE. Best execution routing. Session 33.

QueueImbalance.name: Queue Imbalance
QueueImbalance.description: L1 bid/ask size imbalance detection. Bid_size > 3x ask_size with tight spread = informed accumulation. Glosten & Milgrom (1985). 60% WR within 5 ticks. Session 34.

PreMarketAnomaly.name: Pre-Market Volume Anomaly
PreMarketAnomaly.description: Extended hours RVOL > 3.0 informed flow detection. Pre-market volume spikes predict RTH direction. US 11:00-14:30 UTC / LSE 05:00-08:00 UTC. Session 34.

VolTermStructure.name: Vol Term Structure
VolTermStructure.description: IV vs HV premium detection. When IV > HV by >20% in mean-reverting regime = vol overpriced, buy underlying for mean reversion. Demeterfi et al. (1999), Gatheral (2006). Session 34.

IEXAuctionFade.name: IEX Auction Fade
IEXAuctionFade.description: IEX discretionary auction mean-reversion. Fades auction price vs NBBO mid when deviation > 3 bps. 350+ auctions/day. Session 35.
